tools.name: chat
tools.description: Send a chat message to an LLM with automatic output verification. Routes through the best available provider, validates the response across 6 dimensions (structure, schema, latency, cost, identity, integrity), and auto-heals on failure.

messages.description: Conversation messages in OpenAI format: [{role: 'user', content: '...'}, ...]

model.description: Model name or 'auto' for automatic provider selection. Default: 'auto'.

system_prompt.description: System prompt to prepend to the conversation.

tools.name: health
tools.description: Check which LLM providers are configured and their current health status.

tools.name: providers
tools.description: List all supported LLM providers and their detailed configuration status.

tools.name: stats
tools.description: Get session statistics: total calls, pass rate, failover count, average latency.

tools.name: validation_history
tools.description: Get recent validation history showing which calls passed/failed verification with details.

limit.description: Number of records to return. Default: 20, Max: 100.

prompts.name: verify
prompts.description: Verify an LLM response against 6-dimension validation

prompts.name: compare_providers
prompts.description: Compare configured LLM providers side by side

prompts.name: reliability_audit
prompts.description: Run a reliability audit on configured providers
